title: Cuticle Oil - Vanilla
subtitle: Nourishing oil with Vitamin E, Jojoba & Soybean Oil
shortDescription: Warm vanilla scented cuticle oil with Vitamin E, Jojoba & Soybean Oil.
descriptionHtml: Luxurious oil blend that hydrates cuticles and strengthens nails. Fast-absorbing and non-greasy, perfect for daily use. Enriched with Vitamin E, Jojoba Oil, and Soybean Oil for maximum nourishment. Delicately scented with warm Vanilla fragrance.

seo.title: Cuticle Oil Vanilla | BLOM Cosmetics
seo.description: Vanilla scented cuticle oil with Vitamin E, Jojoba & Soybean Oil. Fast-absorbing, non-greasy formula for daily nail care.

features: Enriched with Vitamin E for nail health
howToUse: Apply a small amount to clean cuticles
Can be used before or after manicure

key: Jojoba Oil – deeply moisturizes and conditions
